title: Temporal Relational Ranking for Stock Prediction
whyItMatters: Useful for ranking stocks using relation structure instead of isolated tickers.

title: HIST: A Graph-based Framework for Stock Trend Forecasting via Mining Concept-Oriented Shared Information
whyItMatters: Useful for mapping company, concept, and sector linkages beyond plain correlation.

title: Chronos: Learning the Language of Time Series
whyItMatters: Good modern overlay for sequence-style forecasting once the local history substrate is clean.

title: TimesFM
whyItMatters: Good for stable foundation-model-style forecasting on cached time-series.

title: Foundations of Technical Analysis
whyItMatters: Classic statistical base layer for trend and reversal interpretation.
